title: Origins: Pyroar
description: A majestic lion imbued with the power of fire. Pyroar are fierce protectors and masters of their fiery domain.
body:
# This Origin is AI Generated, Including Idea and Coding. Debug by manual.

For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Pyroar
A majestic lion imbued with the power of fire. Pyroar are fierce protectors and masters of their fiery domain.

> There have **Normal** version and **Soul** version of **Pyroar**

## Passive
- 🔥**Fire Immunity**
  - Grants full immunity to fire damage.
- 💪 **Strength of the Pride**
  - Provides a additional damage.
    - More damage for **Soul** Version.
- 🌶️ **Heat Adaptation**
  - Immune to effects from the Nether( wither).
- 🦁 **Natural Predator**
  - Deal increased damage against animals and monsters.
- 🩸 **Nether spawn**
  - **Soul** Pyroar will spawn in Nether.
- 💦 **Vulnerability to Water**
  - Takes extra damage when in water.
- 💨 **No Fall Damage**
  - You won't take any fall damage.

## Actives

- 🔥 **Fiery Aura**
  - Spawn fire surrounds you with a small area dealing fire damage when sneaking. 
    - Larger Radius and longer duration for **Soul** Version.
- 🔥 **Infernal Dash**
  - Dash forward in flames, leaving fires on target around jump point.
